message:
fix: Zig 0.15 compatibility fixes for runtime modules

- decimal_class.zig: Wrap struct literals in parentheses for method chaining
- enum.zig: Remove redundant inline keyword in comptime blocks
- random.zig: Rename parameters/variables that shadow Zig primitives (seed→init_seed, u1/u2/u3→r1/r2/r3)
- random.zig: Use math.acos instead of invalid @acos builtin
- selectors/types.zig: Fix invalid \! escape sequence in docstring
- runtime.zig: Add module exports for functools, random, string, fractions, decimal, enum

files.patch:
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-//\! Event types and SelectorKey for I/O multiplexing.
+//! Event types and SelectorKey for I/O multiplexing.
 
 const std = @import("std");
